mapper.select:
/*kr.happyjob.study.system.dao.UserMgmtDao.userlisttotalcnt*/ select count(*) as cnt from tb_userinfo
and loginID Like CONCAT('%', #{searchword}, '%')
and name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchword}, '%')
and ( loginID Like CONCAT('%', #{searchword}, '%') or name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchword}, '%') )

/*kr.happyjob.study.system.dao.UserMgmtDao.userselect*/ select loginID as loginId ,user_type ,name ,password ,sex ,hp ,email ,zipcd ,addr ,dtladdr ,regdate ,loc ,birthday ,filename ,logicalpath ,filesize ,fileext from tb_userinfo where loginID = #{loginid}
/*kr.happyjob.study.system.dao.UserMgmtDao.userselect*/ select filename ,pygicalpath ,logicalpath ,ifnull(filesize,0) as filesize ,fileext from tb_userinfo where loginID = #{loginID}
